name: compatibility
description: OpenClaw version compatibility, runtime surface drift, or adapter regression.

name: proposal
description: New capability, protocol change, or roadmap proposal.

name: maintenance
description: Repository maintenance, cleanup, or non-feature upkeep.

name: dependencies
description: Dependency upgrades for npm packages or GitHub Actions.

name: ci
description: CI, workflows, automation, or repository validation changes.

name: breaking-change
description: Intentional behavior or interface change requiring upgrade attention.

name: good first issue
description: Small, well-scoped issue suitable for first-time contributors.

name: help wanted
description: Extra maintainer or community help would be useful.
